summary: Collected 4 suggestion(s). Top themes: like, web, need, feel, more.

notes.text: 🎯 1. Make it feel less generic, more them  Right now it reads like many dev agencies: “custom solutions, UX/UI, DevOps…”  👉 Suggest:  A bold opinionated headline → instead of “Building a Better Web” → try something like: “We build web apps your developers won’t want to rewrite.” Add a short “how we’re different” section (with real specifics, not buzzwords)

🎥 2. Add a 60-second “how we work” video  People trust faces more than text.  👉 Fun idea:  A quick Loom-style walkthrough: “Here’s how we take your idea → shipped product” Show real screens, not stock footage  Bonus: way higher conversion than static text.

🧠 3. Turn services into interactive experiences  Instead of static sections like “Web Development” or “QA”:  👉 Suggest:  A “What do you need?” quiz “I want to build an MVP” “I need to scale an app” “I need a redesign” Then dynamically show relevant services + case studies  Makes the site feel alive.
Gangster rap all the way. Bling bling
